history.content:
<thought>
I am at the bottom row, facing north. The cell directly in front is lava, so I cannot move forward. To my left is a wall (#), and to my right is a floor cell (.). I should turn clockwise to face east, then I can move forward into safe floor.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing east and the cell directly ahead is a wall (#). The cell to the north is a floor (.), so I should turn counter-clockwise to face north, then I can move forward into that safe cell to continue exploring.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at the bottom row with a wall to the east and lava to the west. The cell north of the agent is floor, which is safe. However, from the previous action we turned clockwise, so the agent is now facing east. Moving forward would hit the wall. To move into the safe floor cell to the north, we need to turn counter-clockwise to face north.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is a wall (#), to the left is a wall (#), and to the right is lava (L). The only possible safe direction to move is behind, which requires two 90-degree turns. I will turn clockwise now to begin facing behind.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing east. The cell directly ahead is floor (.) and is safe. The cell to my left (north) is lava, and to my right (south) is off the observed grid. Moving forward seems the best option to progress toward the goal. I'll move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
